summary: Fox News (Hannity) sit-down interview clip of Trump in Beijing reflecting on his relationship with President Xi and the red-carpet reception. Static talking-head footage with Fox News chyrons and 'BREAKING NEWS'/'HANNITY' lower-thirds. No music, stylization, or editing for youth appeal; it is a straight broadcast interview.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; HANNITY INTERVIEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP IN BEIJING; BREAKING NEWS
